text:
Dispute × Break-up × Swinging Fist (挑発×分裂×振り上げた拳, Chōhatsu × Bunretsu × Furiageta Kobushi) is the 68 th episode of the original Hunter × Hunter anime and the 6th episode of the Yorknew City OVA series. It was released on DVD on March 20 th , 2002.

Overview

Kurapika has captured the leader of the Phantom Troupe, Chrollo Lucilfer. Negotiations are made to exchange him for Killua and Gon.

Synopsis

Phinks' group arrives at the Hotel Beitacle to meet with the other Phantom Troupe members. The others explain to Phinks' group how Chrollo was captured and how they might be able to exchange Gon and Killua for him. The Troupe disagrees on what they believe they should do in this situation. Phinks makes a lot of snide comments to the group who had been at the Hotel during the blackout about their incompetency, leading to him, Feitan, Pakunoda, and Nobunaga almost getting into a brawl. Shalnark interjects before this can happen, though, and urges the group to think of a strategy so they can all move forward.

Leorio drives the car containing Melody, Kurapika, and a bound Chrollo through the city, lamenting the fact that Gon and Killua got captured. Kurapika, still disguised in his wig and makeup, gets mistaken for a girl by Chrollo, who had assumed the Chain User would be a boy. Kurapika then removes his wig, wipes away his lipstick, and warns Chrollo to watch what he says. Chrollo continues to provoke Kurapika, who gets progressively angrier at Chrollo despite Leorio and Melody trying to calm him down. Despite Kurapika threatening him, Chrollo remains completely unbothered by the situation he is currently in. 

This only makes Kurapika angrier; his eyes go scarlet and he grabs Chrollo by the hair and punches him repeatedly. Leorio pulls the car over and scolds Kurapika for lashing out, although he sympathizes with how Kurapika is feeling. He reminds Kurapika that Gon and Killua's lives depend on Chrollo remaining alive, but Chrollo informs them that he is actually a useless hostage to have. Melody confirms that he is telling the truth, as he does not seem to have any anxiety or fear in his heart and seems completely at peace with the idea that he could be about to die. After listening to Chrollo's heartbeat for a while, Melody starts to break down, as the sound of it and how strange Chrollo's feelings are completely disturbing her.

Leorio continues driving, although he is now stressed about what will happen to Gon and Killua if Chrollo truly is useless as a hostage. Kurapika tries to interrogate Chrollo about his position in the Phantom Troupe at the time of the Kurta Clan massacre. Still, Chrollo is uninterested in answering and asks Kurapika what Uvogin's last words were, which Kurapika says he doesn't remember. The two make no progress in their conversation, and Chrollo continues to anger Kurapika. This time, however, Kurapika can calm himself down enough not to attack Chrollo eventually and instead makes a phone call.

At the Hotel, Phinks' phone rings, and Kurapika gives him three instructions to follow; otherwise, Chrollo will die. He tells the Troupe not to follow them, not to hurt Gon or Killua and then asks to speak with Pakunoda. Before Phinks allows him to talk with her, he amusedly tells Kurapika that Gon and Killua may have already been injured. Kurapika hangs up the phone, telling Phinks he won't negotiate. Phinks immediately calls Kurapika back, tells him he is lying, and allows Kurapika to speak with Pakunoda. Before that, however, Pakunoda, Nobunaga, and Machi beat and scold Phinks for toying with Chrollo's captor.

On the phone, Kurapika tells Pakunoda that no one else can hear their conversation, and Pakunoda walks away from the Troupe to go upstairs. Once she is alone, he tells her that she can't communicate with the other Spiders and needs to come to meet him alone. When he is done explaining, he speaks with Nobunaga over the phone and tells him that the Troupe has to let Pakunoda go alone and that he will continue to be in contact with the Troupe. In the car, Chrollo seems certain that Pakunoda will bring the others with her when she comes, but at the hotel, Pakunoda walks away from the Troupe and goes to leave, having made her decision already. Phinks and Nobunaga argue over whether they should follow Pakunoda or not since it will go against the rules of the Spiders to try and save Chrollo. None of the Spiders agree, and Phinks insists on going after Pakunoda, so Nobunaga threatens his life if he should do so. However, before they can fight, Shizuku comes up behind Nobunaga and knocks him out, not wanting the Troupe members to fight, as it is also against the rules.

Kurapika calls again and asks to speak with Gon and Killua. Phinks angrily pushes the phone against Killua's face, who tells Kurapika about the Spiders arguing over what to do. Kurapika tells Phinks to stop making plans, or Chrollo will die and instructs them to take Gon and Killua back to their hideout.

At the hideout, Hisoka constructs a plan of his own, wanting to leave to go fight Chrollo before he dies, but also doesn't want Chrollo to get killed by Kurapika before then since all of the Troupe members are supposed to be accounted for at the hideout when Kurapika calls back. Hisoka texts Illumi and asks him to help him out, to which Illumi agrees.
